Select a start and end date in the reports view to generate range summaries.
Select a start and end date in the audit view to check cash transfers, print vouchers/slips, and check online payments.
Add, modify or delete standard receipt and expense descriptions and their default rates here.
Approve new registrants, create administrative or staff users, update roles, and manage system access credentials.
